title: Governance Configuration
description: Policy knobs for governance behavior. Located at repository workspace: ~/.config/opencode/workspaces/<fingerprint>/governance-config.json

$schema.description: Schema identifier. Optional but recommended for IDE support.

pipeline_mode.description: Enable pipeline mode for governance automation

phase5_max_review_iterations.description: Maximum review iterations for Phase 5 (Plan Architecture Review)

phase6_max_review_iterations.description: Maximum review iterations for Phase 6 (Implementation Review)

opencode_server.description: OpenCode server configuration for direct server-client LLM execution

base_url.description: Base URL for OpenCode server (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:4096). Set AI_GOVERNANCE_WORKSPACE_DIR to enable reading from governance-config.json.
